---
title: "Owen_Work"
author: "Owen Hughes"
date: "2026-03-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

gantt <- tribble(
  ~phase,  ~subtask, ~start, ~end, ~goal, ~deliverable,

  # WP1 — Setup
  "Phase-1", "Attain CBERS-4A Imagery",
  ymd("2026-05-01"), ymd("2026-06-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",
  
  "Phase-1", "Initial image analysis",
  ymd("2026-05-01"), ymd("2026-07-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",

  "Phase-1", "Link GIS to IMPLURB",
  ymd("2026-06-01"), ymd("2026-07-01"),
  "Organize resources.",
  "CBERS-4A data Digital Environment",

  # WP2 — Construction
  "Phase-2", "Imagery Object creation",
  ymd("2026-07-01"), ymd("2026-08-1"),
  "Create and train model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  "Phase-2", "Compute Difference indices",
  ymd("2026-07-15"), ymd("2026-09-01"),
  "Create and train the model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  "Phase-2", "Train model",
  ymd("2026-08-01"), ymd("2026-10-01"),
  "Create and train the model.",
  "Early stage informal housing identification model",

  # WP3 — Application
  "Phase-3", "Hire and Train technicians",
  ymd("2026-10-01"), ymd("2026-12-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication",

  "Phase-3", "Early Warning dashboard",
  ymd("2026-11-01"), ymd("2027-02-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication",

  "Phase-3", "Automatically alert CD",
  ymd("2026-12-01"), ymd("2027-03-01"),
  "Facilitate cooridination between us, IMPLURB, and Civil Defense",
  "Trained staff & interdepartmental communcication"
)

```


```{r}
#library(tidyverse)
#ibrary(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

task_order <- c(
  "Attain CBERS-4A Imagery",
  "Initial image analysis",
  "Link GIS to IMPLURB",
  "Imagery Object creation",
  "Compute Difference indices",
  "Train model",
  "Hire and Train technicians",
  "Early Warning dashboard",
  "Automatically alert CD"
)

custom_cols <- c(
  "Phase-1" = "#020E54",
  "Phase-2" = "#A6DEAE",
  "Phase-3" = "#FF700A"
)

gantt <- gantt %>%
  mutate(
    subtask = factor(subtask, levels = rev(task_order))
  )

ggplot(gantt, aes(y = subtask, x = start, xend = end, color = phase)) +
  geom_segment(aes(yend = subtask), linewidth = 6, lineend = "round") +
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_cols) +   # clearer WP separation
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "2 months",
    date_labels = "%b\n%Y"                  # stacked labels for readability
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Manaus Informal Growth
Early Warning System",
    x = "",
    y = NULL,
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "sans", base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 20)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 1, hjust = 0.5, size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

ggsave("my_plot.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
```{r}


library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(colorspace)


base_gis   <- "#020E54"
base_it    <- "#3A6D3D"
base_equip <- "#FF700A"

gis_col   <- lighten(base_gis,   seq(0, 0.4, length.out = 3))
it_col    <- lighten(base_it,    seq(0, 0.4, length.out = 3))
equip_col <- lighten(base_equip, seq(0, 0.3, length.out = 2))


budget <- tribble(
  ~Category,   ~Role,                   ~AnnualCost,
  "GIS",       "Project Manager",         240000,
  "GIS",       "GIS Technician 1",        108000,
  "GIS",       "GIS Technician 2",        108000,

  "IT",        "Data Engineer",           240000,
  "IT",        "IT Manager",               91680,
  "IT",        "System Administrator",     69840,

  "Equipment", "Workstations",             42000,
  "Equipment", "Cloud/Storage",            10000
)


budget <- budget %>%
  mutate(
    Role = factor(Role, levels = c(
      # GIS (blue)
      "Project Manager",
      "GIS Technician 1",
      "GIS Technician 2",

      # IT (green)
      "Data Engineer",
      "IT Manager",
      "System Administrator",

      # Equipment (orange)
      "Workstations",
      "Cloud/Storage"
    ))
  )


budget <- budget %>%
  arrange(Role) %>%   # ensures GIS → IT → Equipment order
  group_by(Category) %>%
  mutate(Color = case_when(
    Category == "GIS"       ~ gis_col[row_number()],
    Category == "IT"        ~ it_col[row_number()],
    Category == "Equipment" ~ equip_col[row_number()]
  )) %>%
  ungroup()


budget <- budget %>%
  mutate(
    Percent = AnnualCost / sum(AnnualCost)
  )


budget <- budget %>%
  mutate(
    LegendLabel = paste0(Role, " — R$ ", comma(AnnualCost))
  )


budget <- budget %>%
  arrange(Role) %>%   # <-- ensures correct grouping order
  mutate(
    LegendLabel = factor(LegendLabel, levels = LegendLabel)
  )

color_map <- budget %>%
  arrange(Role) %>%
  select(LegendLabel, Color) %>%
  deframe()


ggplot(budget, aes(x = 2, y = Percent, fill = LegendLabel)) +
  
  geom_col(color = "white", width = 1) +
  coord_polar(theta = "y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_map) +
  
  # Donut hole
  xlim(0.5, 2.5) +
  
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title = "Year 1 Salary/Expenditure:",
    subtitle = "          R$909,520, \u00A3130,000",
    fill = "Role (Annual Cost)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )


ggsave(
  filename = "expenditure_donut3.png",
  width = 8,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


```
